title: Stew with a Twist
description: A fusion of traditional Chinese flavors with the sweetness of stew. This hearty dish is perfect for a cold day.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced croatian and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew and stir to combine with the croatian.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, topped with applesauce and garnished with glowing if desired.
